checklist.description: None of the MCP tool input schema properties use `format: 'uuid'` or `format: "uuid"`
checklist.name: No format: uuid

checklist.description: None of the MCP tool input schema properties use `format: 'date-time'` or `format: "date-time"`
checklist.name: No format: date-time

checklist.description: No `format` property appears anywhere in the MCP tool input schemas (neither 'uuid', 'email', 'date-time', nor any other format string)
checklist.name: No format annotations at all

checklist.description: A `get_document` tool definition is exported with an input schema containing at least an `id` property
checklist.name: get_document schema defined

checklist.description: A `create_document` tool definition is exported with input schema containing title, body, and organizationId (or equivalent) properties
checklist.name: create_document schema defined

checklist.description: A `list_documents` tool definition is exported with optional filtering parameters
checklist.name: list_documents schema defined

checklist.description: `design-notes.md` mentions the decision NOT to use `format` annotations in the MCP schemas and/or the reason why
checklist.name: Design notes mention format issue

context: Tests whether the agent avoids adding `format` annotations to MCP tool input schemas, as fastify-mcp validates with Ajv which has no format checkers registered by default, causing E2E test failures.
